ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., ghome) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., LinearSVC) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters and settings for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context set */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context (e.g., all) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the context was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the context */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the context */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sets" (
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "feature_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature set (e.g., 4-syntactic w/o similarity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the feature set */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the feature set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context set */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "test_round" INTEGER /* Test round number */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the evaluation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the evaluation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the evaluation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_configs ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_feature_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_set_id") REFERENCES feature_sets ("feature_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's login name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
